pi_items.verified_value: ITU-T G.711 PCMA,ITU-T G.729,ITU-T G.723,ITU-T G.711 PCMU,8,18,4,0 (multiple codecs in SDP); RTP uses payload type 8 which is PCMA (G.711a)

tshark analysis counting unique RTP SSRC values
tshark analysis extracting sip.Status-Code values from SIP responses

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Wireshark sample capture file 'SIP_CALL_RTP_G711' (real data from Wireshark repository, not synthetic). The PCAP file contains a complete SIP call with RTP media: 14 SIP packets (methods: ACK, INVITE, REGISTER) with responses 100, 180, 200; 1445 RTP packets forming 3 distinct streams; caller is '5514540002' and callee is 'francisco'; codec uses multiple options in SDP (G.711 PCMA, G.729, G.723, G.711 PCMU) with actual RTP transmission using payload type 8 (PCMA/G.711a).
